relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains sanctions screening hit notifications with entity matching details, while the outbound file contains loan application data with employment, financial, and collateral information. These represent fundamentally different business processes (compliance screening vs. loan origination) with minimal field overlap. The inbound data describes a sanctions match event, not a loan application; the outbound data requires extensive loan-specific fields (employment status, income, credit score, collateral, loan terms) that have no source in the inbound schema.
